title: Siramah — Student Summary Information System
deskripsi: An internal business intelligence platform designed to present student data through visual summaries, interactive dashboards, and easy-to-analyze insights.

title: KalaShort
deskripsi: A modern URL shortener built with CodeIgniter 4 featuring real-time analytics, QR code generation, traffic logging, and a lightweight mobile-friendly dashboard.

title: SIAP — Aspirations & Complaint System
deskripsi: An anonymous campus reporting and aspiration platform built with a security-first approach, featuring audit trails, investigation workflows, and registration-free reporting.

title: E-Kinerja — Performance Journal
deskripsi: A daily performance journaling system integrated with task tracking modules for recording academic activities and operational workflows.

title: Cashflow
deskripsi: A personal finance management application for tracking income and expenses, complete with monthly financial recap and reporting features.

title: Graduation Registration Information System
deskripsi: An academic administration platform for graduation registration, equipped with document verification and student status tracking features.

title: Web-Based Information Display
deskripsi: A digital signage system designed to display announcements, schedules, and public information in real time across institutional environments.

title: Payroll Information System
deskripsi: A payroll management system built to automate salary calculations, allowances, deductions, and institutional payroll operations.
